summary: Excellent audience recording of a stellar summer‑'73 show featuring a smoking Dark Star, Cumberland Blues and the famed Eyes sequence
review: The taper did an outstanding job cleaning up this audience source, delivering crystal‑clear sound that beats most Dead auds on the archive. The performance is praised for its solid setlist – especially Dark Star, Cumberland Blues, the 19‑minute Eyes stretch and Sugar Magnolia – making it a must‑listen summer ’73 gem.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for both the musical performance (standout songs, great set) and the cleaned‑up audience recording results in a top‑tier rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Taper’s cleanup work yields very clear, balanced sound; reviewers note it sounds better than 99% of other Dead audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fans describe the set as a classic summer ’73 vibe with tight transitions and a particularly epic 19‑minute Eyes jam.
